text.title: Runbook as Markdown with Tagged Steps Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for inc-runbook-as-markdown-tagged-steps.

decision-tree.root-question: Are runbooks markdown files the team uses today?

example.trace: Agent loads `db-failover.md` → parser yields 3 steps (read, approval-required, verify) → executor runs check-replica-lag (read, no token) → pauses at promote-replica → human signs token → executor runs failover → verify-traffic asserts 200 → audit entries written.
